eval: gpt-oss-120b workhorse swap A/B (RAGAS answer quality)
method: same pipeline + same live index; judge FIXED to llama-3.3-70b for both runs so only the generation model varies. Judge shares the baseline's family, so self-preference bias tilts toward llama: a conservative test for the candidate.
decision: HOLD (not flipped). faithfulness regressed 0.023 (> 0.02 tolerance) on the hallucination guard, while aggregate quality is flat; the ~70% workhorse cost cut does not justify trading the project's strongest safety property wholesale. Revisit as a targeted answers-lane swap or after the Phase 2 faithfulness ladder is in place.
cost_note: gpt-oss-120b $0.15/$0.60 per 1M vs llama-3.3-70b $0.59/$0.79, plus a 0.5x prompt-cache discount; ~70% cheaper on the workhorse line if adopted.
